purpose: Public-safe ledger for recovered FNV Asset Studio and Goodsprings FaceGen work. This file records provenance and acceptance notes only; it does not contain or point to distributable game assets.
localArtifactsPolicy: Keep renders, references, screenshots, source snapshots, and extracted assets in ignored local quarantine storage.

artifacts.notes: Surviving Easy Pete Asset Studio render with good hat, beard, sideburn, and hair/part alignment. Known remaining issue is material/alpha/depth ordering and color, including an inside/back-of-head surface drawing through the face.
Reference image used by the baseline contract.
Recovered Goodsprings face baseline contact sheet.
Native Asset Studio window proof. Logs showed window registration, selector, three-camera preview, and model-preview gates.
Written baseline with exact render/reference hashes and visual contract.

sourceSnapshots.description: Stabilize Asset Studio Goodsprings baseline refs
Document Easy Pete Asset Studio baseline

futureUse: Track skin/face sheen separately from geometry and part placement.
Use the Asset Studio camera tiles as repeatable actor QA views.
Use the reference-contract text as acceptance criteria for actor recovery.
Fold the native Asset Studio proof into the world picker as an optional actor inspection mode after the world/cell browser is stable.
